name: Cool Lemon Chicken Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Chopped cooked Chicken or Turkey
1 cup Halved red or green grapes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the Miracle Whip dressing, basil (either chopped fresh or dried), lemon juice, and grated lemon peel.
2. Add the chopped cooked chicken, halved grapes, halved Chinese pea pods, and thinly sliced red onions to the bowl. Mix lightly until all ingredients are combined.
3. Transfer the mixture to a lettuce-lined platter.
4. Refrigerate for at least 30 minutes before serving to allow flavors to meld together.
